achievements.description: Finish 'The Gauntlet' without pressing back or left.

achievements.description: Finish 'Avalanche's' flag section with a score of 0.

achievements.title: Iron Leg
achievements.description: On any full platforming level, beat a Platinum Relic Time without using the 'Speed Shoes' as Crash.

achievements.title: A Walk in the Park
achievements.description: On any full platforming level, beat a Platinum Relic Time without using the 'Speed Shoes' as Coco.

achievements.title: Ticked-Off
achievements.description: During any Time Trial, keep the timer frozen for 65 seconds in a row or more.

achievements.description: Turn invincible through collecting enough Aku Aku masks.
